economic_notes: First Nation is contingently liable as co-borrower of a demand loan with Bridging Finance Inc. for principal of $5,555,000 at prime plus 11.05%; estimated balance plus accrued interest as of March 31, 2024 was $12,864,000. Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation exists but investments could not be verified by auditor.
notes: Audit is qualified for two reasons: (1) inability to verify completeness and valuation of investments in Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation, and (2) inability to assess completeness of contingencies. Prior year (2023) had a disclaimer of opinion from predecessor auditor. Prior period adjustment of $110,000 decrease to tangible capital assets and equity due to reserve status land previously capitalized. First Nation is contingently liable as co-borrower on a Bridging Finance Inc. demand loan with estimated balance of $12,864,000 as of March 31, 2024. Net financial assets is negative (net debt of $3,207,269). OSR is negative because deferred revenue recognition is negative (revenue reduced by $1,167,805 deferral). Province assigned as MB based on auditor location in Saskatoon SK and Dakota Plains Wahpeton Nation being located in Manitoba; schedule of remuneration not fully provided in extracted text. Infrastructure and capital expenses combined Operations and maintenance ($478,806) and Infrastructure ($389,737).
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (106.61%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
